instruction:
A boat is traveling between two ports by first going S 67 $^o$ E for 51 miles. The boat then stops and turns at a 90 $^o$ angle and travels N 23 $^o$ E for 56 miles to reach the ending port. The straight distance between starting and ending ports is [ANS]
The bearing from the first port to the second port is [ANS] [ANS] $^o$ [ANS].
(Express your answers using at least one decimal place.)
